chapter_title.ar: باب التَّسْمِيَةِ وَ التَّحْمِيدِ وَ الدُّعَاءِ عَلَى الطَّعَامِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 47 – The Naming (Bismillah), and the Praising (Al-Hamdulillah), and the supplication upon the meal

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/110)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/110)
text: أَكَلْتُ مَعَ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) طَعَاماً فَمَا أُحْصِي كَمْ مَرَّةً قَالَ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي جَعَلَنِي أَشْتَهِيهِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Fazzal, from Ibn Bukeyr, from Ubeyd Bin Zurara who said,
‘I ate a meal with Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, so I could not count how many times he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The Praise is for Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Who Made me<sup>asws</sup> desire it’.
en.sarwar: 17. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Faddal from ibn Bukayr from ‘Ubayd ibn Zurarah who has said the following: “I ate food with abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, and I do not know how many times he (the Imam) said, ‘All praise belongs to Allah who has made me to have the appetite for food.’”
